title: Write a Node.js function that takes an array of numbers and returns the sum of all even numbers. Include a brief example of usage.
body: JavaScript function with JSDoc comment and usage example.
problem: Write a Node.js function that takes an array of numbers and returns the sum of all even numbers. Include a brief example of usage.
result_text: function sumEvenNumbers(arr) { if (!Array.isArray(arr)) throw new Error('Input must be an array'); return arr.reduce((sum, n) => { if (typeof n !== 'number' || isNaN(n)) throw new Error('All elements must be numbers'); return n % 2 === 0 ? sum + n : sum; }, 0); }
